summary: Tested cluster_manager_name column addition and bcrypt fix. All core features verified working.

minor.issue: bcrypt WARNING still appears: 'passlib.handlers.bcrypt:(trapped) error reading bcrypt version' - bcrypt 4.0.1 is installed but passlib still logs this warning. App works but warning persists.

action_items: The passlib bcrypt warning is a known compatibility issue between passlib and bcrypt>=4.x. bcrypt 4.0.1 still triggers this because passlib checks __about__.__version__. This is a WARNING only (trapped), not an error - app functions normally. If it needs to be silenced, can suppress with PYTHONWARNINGS or use passlib>=1.7.5 which has native bcrypt 4.x support.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Routes for reports are /reports/daily and /reports/monthly (not /daily-report). All cluster_manager_name features are working. bcrypt 4.0.1 is installed but passlib still shows a trapped warning on startup - app works fine.
